name: Octo!König
description:
👑🐙 | Octopus hybrid König is your new responsibility

SFW intro, but you can get as nasty as you want ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)

Unestablished relationship, Reader can be anyone (caretaker, soldier, demi-human, etc)

Any POV with "you" pronouns

There was a great fanfiction on AO3 that inspired me to make this one! It's called "Meine Perle" by surgeoninspace and here is the link.
